art_market.global_sales_outlook: Korean art market in a period of contraction post-2022 peak, with 2025 H1 sales dropping 37% YoY to $42M; collectors increasingly prioritizing narrative and curatorial context over purely financial speculation.
art_market.key_trends: Despite market cooling, Seoul remains a critical Asian hub for upcoming 2026 exhibitions and Frieze Seoul (Sept 2-5).
art_market.recent_events: Collectors showing heightened discernment; focus remains on established figures and contemporary narrative-driven works.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Bearish sentiment following a 'triple shock' (oil, KRW, rate hike fears) that saw the KOSPI plunge 6.49% to 5,405.75 on March 23.
stock_market.key_factors: Massive institutional/foreign sell-off met by record retail buying. US-Iran conflict remains the primary geopolitical driver, with tentative de-escalation signals causing cautious relief in global markets.
